title: Go JSON and Markdown export local candidate
scope: Local/copied-DB-and-data export candidate for JSON and Markdown note bundles.
implemented_behavior: JSON export includes export_info, notes, categories, tags, attachment metadata, and referenced upload metadata.
Markdown export returns a zip with one frontmatter markdown file per note, _manifest.json, and bundled local upload images rewritten to images/* paths.
Batch note export returns notes/*.md plus assets/* for selected note ids.
All file reads are resolved under PRISM_GO_DATA_DIR/static/uploads and unsafe upload paths are skipped.
production_boundary: Production owner remains Python. This local copied candidate does not deploy Pi, edit Caddy/systemd, change frontend defaults, touch production DB/files, remove Python, or promote live/default JSON/Markdown export ownership.
